prediction.reason: The Texas rivalry. San Antonio is 23-6 at home — one of the best home records in the NBA — and Wembanyama has been outscoring opponents by nearly 10 points per game recently. Houston is solid but missing VanVleet. The Spurs have won 2 of 3 head-to-head matchups this season. Both teams are rested. This is SAS's game to control, but Houston's talent keeps it from being a blowout.
prediction.reason_es: La rivalidad de Texas. San Antonio va 23-6 en casa — uno de los mejores récords de local de la NBA — y Wembanyama ha superado a rivales por casi 10 puntos por partido recientemente. Houston es sólido pero sin VanVleet. Los Spurs han ganado 2 de 3 enfrentamientos directos esta temporada. Ambos equipos descansados. Este es el partido de SAS a controlar, pero el talento de Houston evita que sea una paliza.

prediction.reason: Two of the NBA's best going head to head. Both teams played last night and have identical recent form (4 wins in last 5). The Knicks traveled over 800 miles but have a slightly better overall rating and already beat the Lakers once this season. LeBron is questionable, which could swing this either way. Our model leans New York, but ESPN and Vegas favor the Knicks more. This should be a fantastic game.
prediction.reason_es: Dos de los mejores de la NBA cara a cara. Ambos equipos jugaron anoche y tienen forma reciente idéntica (4 victorias en últimos 5). Los Knicks viajaron más de 800 millas pero tienen una calificación general ligeramente mejor y ya vencieron a los Lakers una vez esta temporada. LeBron es cuestionable, lo cual podría inclinar esto en cualquier dirección. Nuestro modelo se inclina por Nueva York, pero ESPN y Vegas favorecen más a los Knicks. Debería ser un partido fantástico.

prediction.reason: Charlotte has been one of the best teams in the league over the last 10 games — outscoring opponents by nearly 9 points per game. Phoenix has been the opposite, getting outscored by 4 points per game recently. The Hornets traveled over 1,700 miles, which is the main thing holding them back. But their recent form is so much better that even on the road in Phoenix, Charlotte is the pick. Booker and Durant need to figure something out.
prediction.reason_es: Charlotte ha sido uno de los mejores equipos de la liga en los últimos 10 partidos — superando a rivales por casi 9 puntos por partido. Phoenix ha sido lo opuesto, siendo superados por 4 puntos por partido recientemente. Los Hornets viajaron más de 1,700 millas, lo cual es lo principal que los frena. Pero su forma reciente es tan superior que incluso de visitante en Phoenix, Charlotte es la elección. Booker y Durant necesitan resolver algo.

prediction.reason: Dallas is in complete freefall — 6 straight losses with margins of -20, -1, -27, and -13. Kyrie Irving is out and they played last night. prediction.reason: Detroit has the best record in the NBA but they've lost 3 straight and traveled over 1,100 miles. Both teams played last night. prediction.reason_es: Detroit tiene el mejor récord de la NBA pero llevan 3 derrotas seguidas y viajaron más de 1,100 millas. Ambos equipos jugaron anoche. prediction.reason: This is as close as it gets. Boston played last night and traveled 550 miles, while Cleveland has been resting for 3 days. But here's the catch — Donovan Mitchell and Jarrett Allen are both out for the Cavs, which is a huge blow. Boston has beaten Cleveland twice already this season and has been outscoring teams by over 9 points per game recently. The rest advantage barely edges out the injury losses. True toss-up.
prediction.reason_es: Esto es lo más cerrado posible. Boston jugó anoche y viajó 550 millas, mientras Cleveland lleva 3 días descansando. Pero aquí está el detalle — Donovan Mitchell y Jarrett Allen están fuera para los Cavs, lo cual es un golpe enorme. Verdadero toss-up.

prediction.reason: Orlando has won 3 straight and has been the better team recently, even without Franz Wagner. prediction.reason: Sacramento has the worst record in the NBA and it keeps getting worse. Sabonis and Keegan Murray are both out, leaving the Kings with a skeleton crew.
